title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Q&A: Look beyond Trump for the full story on US climate action, says university dean
items.description:
Lawyer Lou Leonard, who leads the climate school at Clark University, says Washington's attacks haven't halted climate efforts across American society

items.title: US pressure puts World Bank’s climate plan at risk
items.description:

items.title: As US and China seek rare earths, Brazilian lawmakers push for state-owned developer
items.description:

items.title: EU carbon tax risks penalising efficient producers over data gaps
items.description:

items.title: IEA slashes pre-war oil demand forecast by nearly a million barrels per day
items.description:

items.title: Fossil Free Zones can be on-ramps to the clean energy transition
items.description:

items.title: Türkiye sets COP31 dates and appoints Australian cattle farmer as youth champion

items.title: Broken debt system must be fixed to confront future climate shocks
items.description:

items.title: GEF raises $3.9bn ahead of funding deadline, $1bn below previous budget
items.description:

items.title: How a global roadmap can meet the promise to halt deforestation
items.description:

items.title: UK imports of “green” jet fuel linked to Amazon deforestation
items.description:

items.title: Italy pushes coal exit back after gas prices rise
items.description:

items.title: Charging worries, high prices put brakes on EV growth in Bangladesh
items.description:

items.title: Nepal’s EV revolution pays off as oil crisis causes pain at the pumps

items.title: Funding gap threatens next round of IPCC climate science reports, chair warns
